TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: ťĘ®ś†ľ. Wenifusin pipatasan i sabaw tu lima a seci a Itali FuoluolunsešĹõÁĺÖŚÄęśĖĮ , nuayawan nuyniyan, sanga nu O-cuo madicemay ku sangan nu tunduh, madicem ku mung, madicem ku cuked, mubahel ku kakapetan tu cabeng, atu ahebalay nu galasuan nu sasingalan a Keude a sangan . Wenifusin picidekan nu sangan atu wayway nipatidengan tu luma' sabaw tu tulu a seci nu hedek, kina pitu ku patelacay nu sececun a hitay midebung hida satu mahedek, cuoseci siidaay atu malalid nu misubayuay a tademaw hamaw satu matadikud. kilul sa haymaw satu kapah ku siakay, masumad tu ku siakay, kapah tu atudi kunikaudip nu kapahay a sikacu', u picedekan nu kasinganganay a lumaan han ci Fuoluolunse ci Maydisiťļ•ŤŅ™Ť•Ņ . pisiwbayan nu luma' nu heni han u giku atu banuh nu sidi ku sakasiidaan, itini i sabaw tu lima a secian mikuwan ku nuheni tu kapulungan a kawawan i Fuoluolunse . . tada u namuh tu nuheni tu nalimaan, mikilim kunuheni tu siidaay singanganay a matinengay tu nalimaan a tademaw, patidengay tu luma', mituktukay tu nalimaan atu idaw ku matinengay tu sapatideng tu lumaay a tademaw, sisa katuud kina sitangahay a tademaw itida namin mapulung i Fuoluolunse. . kiwkay hantu malingatu misabana' tu tademaw , mibabelih tu ku sinza mabidang tu, sisa nabalucuan pasayda tu i zenwen atu liklik tu nu kawaan. . malingatu tu mabulah ku tademaw tu Kuluoma atu Sila' malingatu tu musakamu tu Kedese' kiwkay a dicem, madicem ku panan', caay kahida kunisangan sa, sakamusa caay ka hicahica u lunmua sa. . itini pikulitan ci Yesu, Maliya, dungi, kiwkayay a siidaay a tademaw atu sasing aca nu tadeamaw, caay tu kahida naayaway nu cuoseci anikulitan ahebed atu masakakuay ku wayway. . sisa kulit nu nikuda caay tu kaw sumilaway sa kululit, madayumay a kimkiman nu kulitan, taneng tu malatusa ku adingu atu sikaku tu lihalay tu mikulit, idaw tu ku sakay capi atu mibataday a nisangaan atu lihalaya a aidangan nu kakulitan. Śú®Ť•ŅŚÖÉ1414ŚĻī, (Marcus Vitruvius Pollio) . itini i cacay a malebut sepat a lasubu cacay a bataan idaw ku sepat a mihcaan, i Zuyse a siwtawyun maadih nuheni ku namaka siyun nu ayawan a sici nu Luoma patidengay tu luma' ci Wite'luwi (Á∂≠ÁČĻť≠ĮÁ∂≠Marcus Vitruvius Pollio) nalimaan nida ni kulitan tu luma', itawyaay sakaadihan nu kuden a wenihusin a nalimaan a tademaw, u satabakiay anikaadihan. . itini i wenihusin a zitayan, sapisangaay tu luma' nu angangan, ilabu hantu idaw ku cihesia, tuosefa, pili, atu sakalecad, mikulit, lisia atu pulung aca nu cacacudadan. patidengay tu luma' caay kaw misangaay a cacay tu luma', mahida tu u nalimaan a tademaw tu ayda, kasikadan tu nu tademaw atu siidaay a tademaw. . mahida u sanga nu Kedese sangan, wenihusin sangan idaw ku caaya lalecad nu picidekan a sanga1.mibelin tu kedese nisangaan a wayway pataluma' tu naayaway a sangan: mibelin tu kedese nisangaan tu talakaw atu takelal tu, sisa tada mapalekal tu u kulit nu galasu hida satu malawpes. 2. : 2. misakapah tu sakalecad, idaw ku aunziw, atu sakalecad: misakimulmul, patelek a dugu, saditek mikulit, ahebal nu sasingalan atu laa'd atu sakalecad, nisangaan tu teban i tapiingan idaw ku nipiyukiw tu sakaledadaw. . cuked nu tanayu', talakaw nu badahun, laa'd nu sasingalan a palecaden tu, yadah henay ku dimiad misausi tu ahican ku nipisikian tu kakulitan sa. u Kedese' a sanga caay pisausi tu sasausian, sawsawni misumad atu misumad tu nikulitan kya matatungus atu nisikian a ngalay. 3.makimulmulay a tunduh: sanga nu kuluoma, atu i Luomanse sangan, maadih namin numita ku makimulmulay a dungduh. nisangaan idaw ku pili', pangkiway a makimulmulay inai' tu maadih, masadicemay a talakaw malatawyaay a sangan nu kapicedekan. 4.ŚöīŤ¨ĻÁöĄśüĪŚľŹ Á≥ĽÁĶĪ: 4. kadimelan nu cuked : mahida u Tuosekan a talakaw u pituay a mamulmulan nu patelekay, Duolike'se walu, Ayawniya siwa, Kelinsese' atu fuhese' cacay a bataan, itini nipadihpican, idaw ku Tuosekanse' nu sapiay atu madayumay a hekal, nu sanga han tu masaniyadu' tu ku sanga. Duolikese' a sangan caay ka sadid adihan, u sakay sasa' aca kuyda a sangan. sakatusa tunduh a cuked idaw kunipacabay tu Ayawniyase', sakatulu a tunduh u Kelinsese' atu Fuhese' a cukedan. kacacabi'an nu subayuan, tu tatuntunduhan a cuked u hida' hananay kunipipatapabaw ku sangan. malalitin tu ihekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
S.PHON: **. w…ônifusin pipatasan i sabaw tu r~…ĺima a s…ô ¶i a itar~…ĺi fuor~…ĺuor~…ĺuns…ô**** , nuajawan nujnijan, saŇča nu o- ¶uo madi ¶…ômaj ku saŇčan nu tunduńß, madi ¶…ôm ku muŇč, madi ¶…ôm ku ¶uk…ôd, mubańß…ôr~…ĺ ku kakap…ôtan tu ¶ab…ôŇč, atu ańß…ôbar~…ĺaj nu gar~…ĺasuan nu sasiŇčar~…ĺan a k…ôud…ô a saŇčan . w…ônifusin pi ¶id…ôkan nu saŇčan atu wajwaj nipatid…ôŇčan tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° sabaw tu tur~…ĺu a s…ô ¶i nu ńß…ôd…ôk, kina pitu ku pat…ôr~…ĺa ¶aj nu s…ô ¶…ô ¶un a ńßitaj mid…ôbuŇč ńßida satu mańß…ôd…ôk, ¶uos…ô ¶i siidaaj atu mar~…ĺar~…ĺid nu misubajuaj a tad…ômaw ńßamaw satu matadikud. kir~…ĺur~…ĺ sa ńßajmaw satu kapańß ku siakaj, masumad tu ku siakaj, kapańß tu atudi kunikaudip nu kapańßaj a sika ¶u Ē~ °, u pi ¶…ôd…ôkan nu kasiŇčaŇčanaj a r~…ĺumaan ńßan ¶i fuor~…ĺuor~…ĺuns…ô ¶i majdisi*** . pisiwbajan nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu ńß…ôni ńßan u giku atu banuńß nu sidi ku sakasiidaan, itini i sabaw tu r~…ĺima a s…ô ¶ian mikuwan ku nuńß…ôni tu kapur~…ĺuŇčan a kawawan i fuor~…ĺuor~…ĺuns…ô . . tada u namuńß tu nuńß…ôni tu nar~…ĺimaan, mikir~…ĺim kunuńß…ôni tu siidaaj siŇčaŇčanaj a matin…ôŇčaj tu nar~…ĺimaan a tad…ômaw, patid…ôŇčaj tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, mituktukaj tu nar~…ĺimaan atu idaw ku matin…ôŇčaj tu sapatid…ôŇč tu r~…ĺumaaj a tad…ômaw, sisa katuud kina sitaŇčańßaj a tad…ômaw itida namin mapur~…ĺuŇč i fuor~…ĺuor~…ĺuns…ô. . kiwkaj ńßantu mar~…ĺiŇčatu misabana Ē~ ° tu tad…ômaw , mibab…ôr~…ĺińß tu ku sinza mabidaŇč tu, sisa nabar~…ĺu ¶uan pasajda tu i z…ônw…ôn atu r~…ĺikr~…ĺik tu nu kawaan. . mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu mabur~…ĺańß ku tad…ômaw tu kur~…ĺuoma atu sir~…ĺa Ē~ ° mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu musakamu tu k…ôd…ôs…ô Ē~ ° kiwkaj a di ¶…ôm, madi ¶…ôm ku panan Ē~ °, ¶aaj kańßida kunisaŇčan sa, sakamusa ¶aaj ka ńßi ¶ańßi ¶a u r~…ĺunmua sa. . itini pikur~…ĺitan ¶i j…ôsu, mar~…ĺija, duŇči, kiwkajaj a siidaaj a tad…ômaw atu sasiŇč a ¶a nu tad…ôamaw, ¶aaj tu kańßida naajawaj nu ¶uos…ô ¶i anikur~…ĺitan ańß…ôb…ôd atu masakakuaj ku wajwaj. . sisa kur~…ĺit nu nikuda ¶aaj tu kaw sumir~…ĺawaj sa kur~…ĺur~…ĺit, madajumaj a kimkiman nu kur~…ĺitan, tan…ôŇč tu mar~…ĺatusa ku adiŇču atu sikaku tu r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj tu mikur~…ĺit, idaw tu ku sakaj ¶api atu mibatadaj a nisaŇčaan atu r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaja a aidaŇčan nu kakur~…ĺitan. ********, (mar ¶us *itru*ius por~…ĺr~…ĺio) . itini i ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut s…ôpat a r~…ĺasubu ¶a ¶aj a bataan idaw ku s…ôpat a mińß ¶aan, i zujs…ô a siwtawjun maadińß nuńß…ôni ku namaka sijun nu ajawan a si ¶i nu r~…ĺuoma patid…ôŇčaj tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° ¶i wit…ô Ē~ °r~…ĺuwi (****mar ¶us *itru*ius por~…ĺr~…ĺio) nar~…ĺimaan nida ni kur~…ĺitan tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, itawjaaj sakaadińßan nu kud…ôn a w…ônińßusin a nar~…ĺimaan a tad…ômaw, u satabakiaj anikaadińßan. . itini i w…ônińßusin a zitajan, sapisaŇčaaj tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu aŇčaŇčan, ir~…ĺabu ńßantu idaw ku ¶ińß…ôsia, tuos…ôfa, pir~…ĺi, atu sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, mikur~…ĺit, r~…ĺisia atu pur~…ĺuŇč a ¶a nu ¶a ¶a ¶udadan. patid…ôŇčaj tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° ¶aaj kaw misaŇčaaj a ¶a ¶aj tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, mańßida tu u nar~…ĺimaan a tad…ômaw tu ajda, kasikadan tu nu tad…ômaw atu siidaaj a tad…ômaw. . mańßida u saŇča nu k…ôd…ôs…ô saŇčan, w…ônińßusin saŇčan idaw ku ¶aaja r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu pi ¶id…ôkan a saŇča*.mib…ôr~…ĺin tu k…ôd…ôs…ô nisaŇčaan a wajwaj patar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° tu naajawaj a saŇčan: mib…ôr~…ĺin tu k…ôd…ôs…ô nisaŇčaan tu tar~…ĺakaw atu tak…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺ tu, sisa tada mapar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu u kur~…ĺit nu gar~…ĺasu ńßida satu mar~…ĺawp…ôs. *. : *. misakapańß tu sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, idaw ku aunziw, atu sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad: misakimur~…ĺmur~…ĺ, pat…ôr~…ĺ…ôk a dugu, sadit…ôk mikur~…ĺit, ańß…ôbar~…ĺ nu sasiŇčar~…ĺan atu r~…ĺaa Ē~ °d atu sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, nisaŇčaan tu t…ôban i tapiiŇčan idaw ku nipijukiw tu sakar~…ĺ…ôdadaw. . ¶uk…ôd nu tanaju Ē~ °, tar~…ĺakaw nu badańßun, r~…ĺaa Ē~ °d nu sasiŇčar~…ĺan a par~…ĺ…ô ¶ad…ôn tu, jadańß ńß…ônaj ku dimiad misausi tu ańßi ¶an ku nipisikian tu kakur~…ĺitan sa. u k…ôd…ôs…ô Ē~ ° a saŇča ¶aaj pisausi tu sasausian, sawsawni misumad atu misumad tu nikur~…ĺitan kja matatuŇčus atu nisikian a Ňčar~…ĺaj. *.makimur~…ĺmur~…ĺaj a tunduńß: saŇča nu kur~…ĺuoma, atu i r~…ĺuomans…ô saŇčan, maadińß namin numita ku makimur~…ĺmur~…ĺaj a duŇčduńß. nisaŇčaan idaw ku pir~…ĺi Ē~ °, paŇčkiwaj a makimur~…ĺmur~…ĺaj inai Ē~ ° tu maadińß, masadi ¶…ômaj a tar~…ĺakaw mar~…ĺatawjaaj a saŇčan nu kapi ¶…ôd…ôkan. *.***** **: *. kadim…ôr~…ĺan nu ¶uk…ôd : mańßida u tuos…ôkan a tar~…ĺakaw u pituaj a mamur~…ĺmur~…ĺan nu pat…ôr~…ĺ…ôkaj, duor~…ĺik…ô Ē~ °s…ô war~…ĺu, ajawnija siwa, k…ôr~…ĺins…ôs…ô Ē~ ° atu fuńß…ôs…ô Ē~ ° ¶a ¶aj a bataan, itini nipadińßpi ¶an, idaw ku tuos…ôkans…ô Ē~ ° nu sapiaj atu madajumaj a ńß…ôkar~…ĺ, nu saŇča ńßan tu masanijadu Ē~ ° tu ku saŇča. duor~…ĺik…ôs…ô Ē~ ° a saŇčan ¶aaj ka sadid adińßan, u sakaj sasa Ē~ ° a ¶a kujda a saŇčan. sakatusa tunduńß a ¶uk…ôd idaw kunipa ¶abaj tu ajawnijas…ô Ē~ °, sakatur~…ĺu a tunduńß u k…ôr~…ĺins…ôs…ô Ē~ ° atu fuńß…ôs…ô Ē~ ° a ¶uk…ôdan. ka ¶a ¶abi Ē~ °an nu subajuan, tu tatuntunduńßan a ¶uk…ôd u ńßida Ē~ ° ńßananaj kunipipatapabaw ku saŇčan. mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: ťĘ®ś†ľ. Wenifusin pipatasan i sabaw tu lima a seci a Itali FuoluolunsešĹõÁĺÖŚÄęśĖĮ , nuayawan nuyniyan, sanga nu O-cuo madicemay ku sangan nu tunduh, madicem ku mung, madicem ku cuked, mubahel ku kakapetan tu cabeng, atu ahebalay nu galasuan nu sasingalan a Keude a sangan . Wenifusin picidekan nu sangan atu wayway nipatidengan tu luma' sabaw tu tulu a seci nu hedek, kina pitu ku patelacay nu sececun a hitay midebung hida satu mahedek, cuoseci siidaay atu malalid nu misubayuay a tademaw hamaw satu matadikud. kilul sa haymaw satu kapah ku siakay, masumad tu ku siakay, kapah tu atudi kunikaudip nu kapahay a sikacu', u picedekan nu kasinganganay a lumaan han ci Fuoluolunse ci Maydisiťļ•ŤŅ™Ť•Ņ . pisiwbayan nu luma' nu heni han u giku atu banuh nu sidi ku sakasiidaan, itini i sabaw tu lima a secian mikuwan ku nuheni tu kapulungan a kawawan i Fuoluolunse . . tada u namuh tu nuheni tu nalimaan, mikilim kunuheni tu siidaay singanganay a matinengay tu nalimaan a tademaw, patidengay tu luma', mituktukay tu nalimaan atu idaw ku matinengay tu sapatideng tu lumaay a tademaw, sisa katuud kina sitangahay a tademaw itida namin mapulung i Fuoluolunse. . kiwkay hantu malingatu misabana' tu tademaw , mibabelih tu ku sinza mabidang tu, sisa nabalucuan pasayda tu i zenwen atu liklik tu nu kawaan. . malingatu tu mabulah ku tademaw tu Kuluoma atu Sila' malingatu tu musakamu tu Kedese' kiwkay a dicem, madicem ku panan', caay kahida kunisangan sa, sakamusa caay ka hicahica u lunmua sa. . itini pikulitan ci Yesu, Maliya, dungi, kiwkayay a siidaay a tademaw atu sasing aca nu tadeamaw, caay tu kahida naayaway nu cuoseci anikulitan ahebed atu masakakuay ku wayway. . sisa kulit nu nikuda caay tu kaw sumilaway sa kululit, madayumay a kimkiman nu kulitan, taneng tu malatusa ku adingu atu sikaku tu lihalay tu mikulit, idaw tu ku sakay capi atu mibataday a nisangaan atu lihalaya a aidangan nu kakulitan. Śú®Ť•ŅŚÖÉ1414ŚĻī, (Marcus Vitruvius Pollio) . itini i cacay a malebut sepat a lasubu cacay a bataan idaw ku sepat a mihcaan, i Zuyse a siwtawyun maadih nuheni ku namaka siyun nu ayawan a sici nu Luoma patidengay tu luma' ci Wite'luwi (Á∂≠ÁČĻť≠ĮÁ∂≠Marcus Vitruvius Pollio) nalimaan nida ni kulitan tu luma', itawyaay sakaadihan nu kuden a wenihusin a nalimaan a tademaw, u satabakiay anikaadihan. . itini i wenihusin a zitayan, sapisangaay tu luma' nu angangan, ilabu hantu idaw ku cihesia, tuosefa, pili, atu sakalecad, mikulit, lisia atu pulung aca nu cacacudadan. patidengay tu luma' caay kaw misangaay a cacay tu luma', mahida tu u nalimaan a tademaw tu ayda, kasikadan tu nu tademaw atu siidaay a tademaw. . mahida u sanga nu Kedese sangan, wenihusin sangan idaw ku caaya lalecad nu picidekan a sanga1.mibelin tu kedese nisangaan a wayway pataluma' tu naayaway a sangan: mibelin tu kedese nisangaan tu talakaw atu takelal tu, sisa tada mapalekal tu u kulit nu galasu hida satu malawpes. 2. : 2. misakapah tu sakalecad, idaw ku aunziw, atu sakalecad: misakimulmul, patelek a dugu, saditek mikulit, ahebal nu sasingalan atu laa'd atu sakalecad, nisangaan tu teban i tapiingan idaw ku nipiyukiw tu sakaledadaw. . cuked nu tanayu', talakaw nu badahun, laa'd nu sasingalan a palecaden tu, yadah henay ku dimiad misausi tu ahican ku nipisikian tu kakulitan sa. u Kedese' a sanga caay pisausi tu sasausian, sawsawni misumad atu misumad tu nikulitan kya matatungus atu nisikian a ngalay. 3.makimulmulay a tunduh: sanga nu kuluoma, atu i Luomanse sangan, maadih namin numita ku makimulmulay a dungduh. nisangaan idaw ku pili', pangkiway a makimulmulay inai' tu maadih, masadicemay a talakaw malatawyaay a sangan nu kapicedekan. 4.ŚöīŤ¨ĻÁöĄśüĪŚľŹ Á≥ĽÁĶĪ: 4. kadimelan nu cuked : mahida u Tuosekan a talakaw u pituay a mamulmulan nu patelekay, Duolike'se walu, Ayawniya siwa, Kelinsese' atu fuhese' cacay a bataan, itini nipadihpican, idaw ku Tuosekanse' nu sapiay atu madayumay a hekal, nu sanga han tu masaniyadu' tu ku sanga. Duolikese' a sangan caay ka sadid adihan, u sakay sasa' aca kuyda a sangan. sakatusa tunduh a cuked idaw kunipacabay tu Ayawniyase', sakatulu a tunduh u Kelinsese' atu Fuhese' a cukedan. kacacabi'an nu subayuan, tu tatuntunduhan a cuked u hida' hananay kunipipatapabaw ku sangan. malalitin tu ihekalay atu zumaay a natinengan

majdisi*** . pisiwbajan nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu ńß…ôni ńßan u giku atu banuńß nu sidi ku sakasiidaan, itini i sabaw tu r~…ĺima a s…ô ¶ian mikuwan ku nuńß…ôni tu kapur~…ĺuŇčan a kawawan i fuor~…ĺuor~…ĺuns…ô . . tada u namuńß tu nuńß…ôni tu nar~…ĺimaan, mikir~…ĺim kunuńß…ôni tu siidaaj siŇčaŇčanaj a matin…ôŇčaj tu nar~…ĺimaan a tad…ômaw, patid…ôŇčaj tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, mituktukaj tu nar~…ĺimaan atu idaw ku matin…ôŇčaj tu sapatid…ôŇč tu r~…ĺumaaj a tad…ômaw, sisa katuud kina sitaŇčańßaj a tad…ômaw itida namin mapur~…ĺuŇč i fuor~…ĺuor~…ĺuns…ô. . kiwkaj ńßantu mar~…ĺiŇčatu misabana Ē~ ° tu tad…ômaw , mibab…ôr~…ĺińß tu ku sinza mabidaŇč tu, sisa nabar~…ĺu ¶uan pasajda tu i z…ônw…ôn atu r~…ĺikr~…ĺik tu nu kawaan. . mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu mabur~…ĺańß ku tad…ômaw tu kur~…ĺuoma atu sir~…ĺa Ē~ ° mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu musakamu tu k…ôd…ôs…ô Ē~ ° kiwkaj a di ¶…ôm, madi ¶…ôm ku panan Ē~ °, ¶aaj kańßida kunisaŇčan sa, sakamusa ¶aaj ka ńßi ¶ańßi ¶a u r~…ĺunmua sa. . itini pikur~…ĺitan ¶i j…ôsu, mar~…ĺija, duŇči, kiwkajaj a siidaaj a tad…ômaw atu sasiŇč a ¶a nu tad…ôamaw, ¶aaj tu kańßida naajawaj nu ¶uos…ô ¶i anikur~…ĺitan ańß…ôb…ôd atu masakakuaj ku wajwaj. . sisa kur~…ĺit nu nikuda ¶aaj tu kaw sumir~…ĺawaj sa kur~…ĺur~…ĺit, madajumaj a kimkiman nu kur~…ĺitan, tan…ôŇč tu mar~…ĺatusa ku adiŇču atu sikaku tu r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj tu mikur~…ĺit, idaw tu ku sakaj ¶api atu mibatadaj a nisaŇčaan atu r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaja a aidaŇčan nu kakur~…ĺitan. ********, (mar ¶us *itru*ius por~…ĺr~…ĺio) . itini i ¶a ¶aj a mar~…ĺ…ôbut s…ôpat a r~…ĺasubu ¶a ¶aj a bataan idaw ku s…ôpat a mińß ¶aan, i zujs…ô a siwtawjun maadińß nuńß…ôni ku namaka sijun nu ajawan a si ¶i nu r~…ĺuoma patid…ôŇčaj tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° ¶i wit…ô Ē~ °r~…ĺuwi (****mar ¶us *itru*ius por~…ĺr~…ĺio) nar~…ĺimaan nida ni kur~…ĺitan tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, itawjaaj sakaadińßan nu kud…ôn a w…ônińßusin a nar~…ĺimaan a tad…ômaw, u satabakiaj anikaadińßan. . itini i w…ônińßusin a zitajan, sapisaŇčaaj tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu aŇčaŇčan, ir~…ĺabu ńßantu idaw ku ¶ińß…ôsia, tuos…ôfa, pir~…ĺi, atu sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, mikur~…ĺit, r~…ĺisia atu pur~…ĺuŇč a ¶a nu ¶a ¶a ¶udadan. patid…ôŇčaj tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° ¶aaj kaw misaŇčaaj a ¶a ¶aj tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, mańßida tu u nar~…ĺimaan a tad…ômaw tu ajda, kasikadan tu nu tad…ômaw atu siidaaj a tad…ômaw. . mańßida u saŇča nu k…ôd…ôs…ô saŇčan, w…ônińßusin saŇčan idaw ku ¶aaja r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu pi ¶id…ôkan a saŇča*.mib…ôr~…ĺin tu k…ôd…ôs…ô nisaŇčaan a wajwaj patar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° tu naajawaj a saŇčan: mib…ôr~…ĺin tu k…ôd…ôs…ô nisaŇčaan tu tar~…ĺakaw atu tak…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺ tu, sisa tada mapar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu u kur~…ĺit nu gar~…ĺasu ńßida satu mar~…ĺawp…ôs. *. : *. misakapańß tu sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, idaw ku aunziw, atu sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad: misakimur~…ĺmur~…ĺ, pat…ôr~…ĺ…ôk a dugu, sadit…ôk mikur~…ĺit, ańß…ôbar~…ĺ nu sasiŇčar~…ĺan atu r~…ĺaa Ē~ °d atu sakar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad, nisaŇčaan tu t…ôban i tapiiŇčan idaw ku nipijukiw tu sakar~…ĺ…ôdadaw. . ¶uk…ôd nu tanaju Ē~ °, tar~…ĺakaw nu badańßun, r~…ĺaa Ē~ °d nu sasiŇčar~…ĺan a par~…ĺ…ô ¶ad…ôn tu, jadańß ńß…ônaj ku dimiad misausi tu ańßi ¶an ku nipisikian tu kakur~…ĺitan sa. u k…ôd…ôs…ô Ē~ ° a saŇča ¶aaj pisausi tu sasausian, sawsawni misumad atu misumad tu nikur~…ĺitan kja matatuŇčus atu nisikian a Ňčar~…ĺaj. *.makimur~…ĺmur~…ĺaj a tunduńß: saŇča nu kur~…ĺuoma, atu i r~…ĺuomans…ô saŇčan, maadińß namin numita ku makimur~…ĺmur~…ĺaj a duŇčduńß. nisaŇčaan idaw ku pir~…ĺi Ē~ °, paŇčkiwaj a makimur~…ĺmur~…ĺaj inai Ē~ ° tu maadińß, masadi ¶…ômaj a tar~…ĺakaw mar~…ĺatawjaaj a saŇčan nu kapi ¶…ôd…ôkan. *.***** **: *. kadim…ôr~…ĺan nu ¶uk…ôd : mańßida u tuos…ôkan a tar~…ĺakaw u pituaj a mamur~…ĺmur~…ĺan nu pat…ôr~…ĺ…ôkaj, duor~…ĺik…ô Ē~ °s…ô war~…ĺu, ajawnija siwa, k…ôr~…ĺins…ôs…ô Ē~ ° atu fuńß…ôs…ô Ē~ ° ¶a ¶aj a bataan, itini nipadińßpi ¶an, idaw ku tuos…ôkans…ô Ē~ ° nu sapiaj atu madajumaj a ńß…ôkar~…ĺ, nu saŇča ńßan tu masanijadu Ē~ ° tu ku saŇča. duor~…ĺik…ôs…ô Ē~ ° a saŇčan ¶aaj ka sadid adińßan, u sakaj sasa Ē~ ° a ¶a kujda a saŇčan. sakatusa tunduńß a ¶uk…ôd idaw kunipa ¶abaj tu ajawnijas…ô Ē~ °, sakatur~…ĺu a tunduńß u k…ôr~…ĺins…ôs…ô Ē~ ° atu fuńß…ôs…ô Ē~ ° a ¶uk…ôdan. ka ¶a ¶abi Ē~ °an nu subajuan, tu tatuntunduńßan a ¶uk…ôd u ńßida Ē~ ° ńßananaj kunipipatapabaw ku saŇčan. mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
